project_summary: BrandGuard is an AI sidekick that lives inside Figma, Slack, Google Docs and Webflow; one click scans any image, slide or tweet against your living brand bible and returns a 0-100 BrandScore plus one-click fixes for colors, fonts, tone, logo clearance, accessibility and regulated phrases, while a Slack bot posts the before/after gif to the team, every approved correction retrains your private LLM so suggestions get eerily on-brand, the free tier gives 25 scans a month, Starter $29 gives 500 scans and Slack bot, Growth $199 adds API and compliance exports, Enterprise is SOC-2 on-prem, moat is a patent-pending vector logo extractor that works on raster images plus a tone-fingerprint model trained only on your past copy, growth comes from a public BrandScore badge that turns every shared asset into a lead-gen form and a template marketplace where creators sell BrandGuard-approved Canva kits and we keep 30%

issues.title: Initialize Monorepo Structure and Go Workspace

issues.notes: Ensure Go modules are configured to support local path imports for shared libraries.
